content: ~ I came back to the topic 'Personalkündigung'.
A psychological debuff? | A subtle warning?
~ Management thinks the BGB is a weapon.
~ But we are going to look at the actual patch notes.
Standard exit strategy. | Bound by strict time limits.
Immediate termination. | Requires massive breach of trust.
Mutual agreement to quit. | Warning: Triggers 'Arbeitsamt' debuff.
The Notice Period | Respecting the Timer
A graceful exit. | No explicit reason required from the employee.
Berufsfreiheit. | If you can't quit gracefully, it's forced labor.
'Pack your desk right now.' | Bypasses the cooldown timer.
Requires severe misconduct. | Violence, theft, or extreme insults.
Get paid to leave quietly. | But beware the 12-week block.
~ You cannot drop the Nuke without a target lock.
Minor offenses require warnings. | Warns of contract termination.
You cannot nuke a fly. | Use the lowest effective force.
'...nicht zugemutet werden kann.' | Cannot be reasonably expected.
Must prove keeping you for 4 weeks | causes catastrophic damage.
Boss finds out about misconduct? | They have exactly two weeks.
Miss the window? | The Nuke is deactivated.
The offense is wiped from active cache. | Must use ordinary cooldown.
Mehmet (17, Azubi) | Locked in. Needs parents' double signature.
After probation, standard firing is disabled. | You are wearing plot armor.
The Player | 31 years of flawless loyalty.
The Crime | Kept two deposit receipts worth 1.30€.
The Employer's Play | Dropped the Nuke.
The Trust Buffer | Decades of Loyalty
31 flawless years creates massive trust. | 1.30€ cannot instantly one-shot it.
Employer failed the mechanics. | An 'Abmahnung' was required.
The Burden of Proof | Lies with the Employer
The system prevents emotional firing. | Mathematical precision.
Protects the young from rash choices. | Protects veterans from ruthless cuts.
